perspectives.headline: Iranian airport and bridges hit as US forces board ship amid ports blockade – Middle East crisis live
perspectives.excerpt: Welcome to our live coverage of the latest in the continuing Middle East crisis. US strikes on Iran overnight hit an airport, a railway station and two bridges, according to Iranian state media on Friday, while American forces boarded a ship as they enforced a renewed blockade of Iranian ports. Three blasts were heard around Iranshahr airport in the south-east and at least one US projectile hit.…

After a stunning performance in Argentina’s come-from-behind win against England, the 39-year old securing the defending World Cup champions their second final in a row, much to the delight of organizers – who last year understood Messi’s star power when they bent the rules to include his Inter Miami side in the Club World Cup.
